word: H6209 - עָרַר - ʻârar - aw-rar' - Make bare

sections.paragraph:
Original: ערר

Transliteration: ‛ârar

Phonetic: aw-rar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to strip, make bare, strip oneself
    1. (Qal) to strip, strip oneself
    2. (Poel) to lay bare
    3. (Hithpalpel) to be utterly stripped, be utterly laid bare
    4. (Pilpel) break

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1705

Part(s) of speech: Verb
